response:
### Exact Directions (Only Left/Right Turns; No U-Turns/Non-Standard Turns)
**Starting Point: Oakridge Neighborhood Park (North Entrance Curb Cut) | Starting Orientation: Facing *OUT* of the park (toward 2-lane Oakridge Drive; your back is to the park’s blue-roofed picnic pavilion). All turns are relative to your current forward direction. Straight travel between turns is allowed, but all directional changes (turns) are exclusively left/right.**

1. **Turn RIGHT** onto the Oakridge Drive eastbound sidewalk.  
   (Walk straight *until* the chipped red mailbox mounted on a wooden post at the Oakridge Drive / 2nd Street corner—this is just a travel segment, no turn here.)
2. **At the red mailbox corner, Turn LEFT** onto the 2nd Street northbound sidewalk.  
   (Walk straight *until* the neon yellow fire hydrant at the 2nd Street / Birch Avenue corner—travel segment only.)
3. **At the neon yellow fire hydrant, Turn RIGHT** onto the Birch Avenue eastbound sidewalk.  
   (Walk straight *until* the "No Parking" sign bolted to a gnarled maple tree at the Birch Avenue / Library Lane corner—travel segment only.)
4. **At the maple tree "No Parking" sign, Turn LEFT** onto the Library Lane sidewalk.  
   (Walk straight 50 feet—no turn—until you reach the **Maplewood Public Library Main Entrance** (glass awning with black book decals, metal bike rack out front).)

### Validation:
Every directional change (turn) is explicitly left or right; no other turn types are used. Landmarks eliminate ambiguity about where to turn.
